name: Northwind Traders
description: Northwind Traders - Gourmet food distribution analytics with sales, orders, products, and customer insights

content.title: Northwind Traders
content.content:
# Northwind Traders

Northwind Traders is a gourmet food distribution company supplying specialty food products to retailers and restaurants worldwide. Analytics cover 77 products, 91 customers, 9 employees, 29 suppliers, and 830 orders.

This is a model for the [Northwind Database](https://github.com/microsoft/sql-server-samples/blob/master/samples/databases/northwind-pubs/readme.md). It is a small data domain modelling an e-commerce store. The complexity is moderate, however it is more realistic than, e.g., a TODO application or a blog application.

The Northwind Database is ideal to explain basic concepts around data modelling and creating views and interactive articles. We have updated the data only so slightly as to move the dates from the 90ies to the 2020s.

For the first time ever, we have created an annual report of Northwind, and we demonstrate our ideas to create interactive articles to report and explain data. Here is the major dashboard:

@@("Northwind/Analytics/Dashboard")

Please have a look at the [Northwind Analytics](/Northwind/Analytics) for interactive dashboards, the [Northwind Reports](/Northwind/Reports) for detailed data analysis, and the [Northwind Articles](/Northwind/Articles) for reference documentation.

For a comprehensive reference of all addressable items, see the [Northwind Unified References](/Northwind/Articles/NorthwindUnifiedReferences).
